title: Xiaoan's Mooncake Fever
description: A submod of Xiaoan's Farming Core, brings mooncakes to the game!
body:
![Mod Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29af171c42c2a87c7cbf7eec9bd7f19a0d8a8b2b_0.webp) ## Welcome to Xiaoan's Mooncake Fever! [GitHub](https://github.com/matthewlu070111/xiaoanmooncake) | [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/xiaoanmooncake) | [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xiaoanmooncake)
**Mooncake is the best!** ### ❓ What's this mod? This mod is Xiaoan's Farming Core [[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/xiaoanfc) / [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/xiaoanfc)] mods' submod, which adds a lot of mooncake-related content to the game, including new mooncake recipes, new mooncake items, and more! ### ▶️ TODO List - More mooncakes - Special Mid-Autumn Festival events - ... and more! ### 🙋 FAQ 1. **Can I pull requests?**
Of course, pull a request whenever you want to, and if it really does benefit then it will be merged! 2. **Can I make submods of Xiaoan's Farming Core or this mod?**
Of course, but make sure to use CC0-1.0 as the licence of your mod. 3. **Can I contain your mod(s) in my modpack?**
Do it if you want, you don't have to grant permissions! 4. **Can I port your mod(s) into (Neo)Forge?**
To be honest, you can join me if you want to make a Forge mod, the reason why I didn't make a Forge version is that I have no time to make it.
